NN_SPLMT_SBSTN_USE_OPTOUT_SW 

LABEL: Navigated Supplemental HRSN Substance Use Opted Out 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): navigated supplemental health related social need (HRSN) substance use 
opted out of further navigation services. 

LONG NAME: NN_SPLMT_SBSTN_USE_OPTOUT_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing
